tests.name: Standby Cycle Checks
tests.message:
*HTML* Test has been re-executed and results merged.
New status: FAIL
New message: Setup failed: TimeoutError: [WinError 10060] A connection attempt failed because the connected party did not properly respond after a period of time, or established connection failed because connected host has failed to respond Also teardown failed: AttributeError: 'SerialControl' object has no attribute 'tn'
